summary: Iteration 12 BYOK pricing pivot + Onboarding wizard testing. Backend 100% (7/7 iteration_12 tests + 5/5 dropi_import). Frontend Onboarding wizard fully functional (progress, 5 stepper testids, chatea_pro save->connected, LLM picker with 5 pills, save under selected provider, minimum_ok -> launch btn nav to /app, dropi info step with /app/import link, sidebar entry present). Funnel Pricing renders 5 tiers with correct testids (using generated slugs prueba-14-das, starter, growth, agencia-scale, hecho-por-ti-managed), BYOK/Managed banners text-accurate, USD+COP prices present, monthly<->annual toggle multiplies by 10 correctly. HOWEVER: ByokSection component is defined in Funnel.jsx but NEVER rendered — data-testid='funnel-byok' and byok-row-0..4 are MISSING from the DOM. This fails multiple frontend acceptance criteria.

ui_bugs.issue: ByokSection is defined (line 707) but never rendered in the FunnelPage JSX. `<ByokSection />` must be inserted before `<PricingSection />` (around line 413). Currently funnel-byok testid and byok-row-0..4 are absent from the page — the entire BYOK explainer comparison table is missing.

issues: 'pricing-recommended' badge text is 'Más popular' (title case). Review asserts 'MÁS POPULAR' literal. If a case-sensitive assertion is used it will fail. Consider uppercasing the string or rely on CSS text-transform + normalized comparison.

action_items: Render <ByokSection /> in Funnel.jsx FunnelPage — insert it just before <PricingSection /> (line ~413). This restores funnel-byok + byok-row-0..4 testids required by the spec.
(Optional) Change the recommended badge string to 'MÁS POPULAR' (uppercase) for case-sensitive assertions.
critical_code_review_comments: Funnel.jsx is 848 lines — should be split into subcomponents (PricingSection, ByokSection, FeaturesGrid, FaqSection, VipForm) into separate files.

Slug builder in card testids produces 'prueba-14-das' (accent 'í' stripped by /[^a-z0-9-]/g). If future tests want 'prueba-14-dias', normalize accents (String.prototype.normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'')).
seed_data_creation: Temporarily PUT chatea_pro (cp_ui_test_123 / cp_e2e_ABC) and groq (gsk_ui_test_XYZ / gsk_e2e_XYZ) then DELETEd both at end of tests to return to env fallback.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Only the ByokSection render is missing — everything else passes 100%. After main agent adds <ByokSection /> before <PricingSection /> in Funnel.jsx, re-run just the Funnel BYOK assertions (data-testid=funnel-byok, byok-row-0..4). Card testids use accent-stripped slugs (prueba-14-das, agencia-scale, hecho-por-ti-managed). Backend onboarding endpoint + regression fully green.
rca of the issue: Funnel.jsx defines function ByokSection() at line 707 but the FunnelPage return JSX never invokes it. The comment on line 412 says '// PRECIOS — 3 planes con spotlight' and next line renders <PricingSection />, then <FeaturesGrid /> — a missing <ByokSection /> between problem section and PricingSection. Fix: add `<ByokSection />` line immediately before `<PricingSection />`.
